seoTitle: Millendon vs Mills Lake — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Millendon and Mills Lake. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Millendon vs Mills Lake: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Millendon and Mills Lake.
heading: Millendon vs Mills Lake — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Millendon, Western Australia and Mills Lake, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Millendon has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Mills Lake (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Millendon or Mills Lake safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Millendon has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Mills Lake scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Millendon scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Mills Lake scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Millendon or Mills Lake?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Millendon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
